description_long: This is a modern cable-stayed bridge with two prominent pylons supporting the main span via a series of radiating cables. The deck is long and slender, with a flat roadway surface and minimalistic design, typical of contemporary urban infrastructure. The pylons rise vertically from the deck and are connected by taut cables that fan out symmetrically to both sides, providing both structural support and visual elegance. The bridge features a low-profile railing along the edges, likely made of metal, ensuring safety without obstructing the view. The overall color scheme is a combination of dark gray for the deck and pylons, and lighter gray or white for the cables. The structure is engineered for both functionality and aesthetic appeal, making it suitable for spanning wide urban waterways or valleys.
description: A sleek, modern cable-stayed bridge with two tall pylons and radiating support cables, featuring a flat deck and minimalist metal railings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bridge, two pylons, and the symmetrical arrangement of cables.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the narrow width of the deck and the vertical alignment of the pylons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same cable and pylon arrangement visible.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, again showing the narrow deck and vertical pylons.
attribute_railing_design: metal bars with vertical balusters, minimalistic and functional
